title: Bhagavad Gita
description: Canonical source text of duty, wisdom, devotion, and liberation.
meta_description: Canonical source text of the Bhagavad Gita with chapters, sections, and verses.
insight_caption: This source book contains the canonical chapters and verses that later collection books can reuse without duplicating content.

title: Path of Action
description: A curated collection focused on duty, discipline, responsibility, and service through action.
meta_description: A curated book view focused on disciplined action, duty, and service.
insight_caption: This collection follows the discipline of action, showing how work becomes transformative when it is aligned with clarity and service.

title: Path of Knowledge
description: A curated collection centered on discernment, self-knowledge, and metaphysical clarity.
meta_description: A curated book view centered on discernment, self-knowledge, and metaphysical clarity.
insight_caption: This collection gathers chapters where discrimination, self-knowledge, and insight into reality become the dominant emphasis.

title: Path of Devotion
description: A curated collection on devotion, divine relationship, surrender, and living faith.
meta_description: A curated devotional reading path through the Bhagavad Gita.
insight_caption: This collection traces the devotional arc of the Gita, where love, surrender, and divine vision become central.
